title: Hope for City
description:
Hope For City is an Old-School RPG game. We designed this game for mini rpg & survival fans. Farming, crafting, combat, fishing, mini games and more, just explore it! 
Monsters, wild animals, orcs... Who do you think will win?

Features• Mini RPG Survival game!

• You can loot items!

• Manage the basic farm system!

• Buy new weapons and armors!

• Fight with enemies and monsters!

• You can fish!

• You can cook!

• You can be a miner!

• Turn Based Combat System!

• Sail your own boat!

• New mini games!

Explore the forest, discover secret places...
description_short: Hope For City is an Old-School RPG game. We designed this game for mini rpg & survival fans. Farming, crafting, combat, fishing, mini games and more, just explore it! Monsters, wild animals, orcs... Who do you think will win?
